title: bupleurum multinerve var. longiinvolucratum
intro: Bupleurum multinerve var. longiinvolucratum, also known as Chai Hu, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family Apiaceae. This plant is traditionally used in Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antiviral, and immunomodulatory effects. The health benefits of Chai Hu include reducing stress and anxiety, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system, making it a popular herbal remedy for various health issues. Chai Hu can be prepared into herbal teas, decoctions, or capsules, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
